user.title: Connect to VeSync
user.description: Sign in with your VeSync app account. UK/EU accounts should use their two-letter country code (e.g. GB).

error.invalid_auth: Invalid email or password. If your account has 2FA enabled, temporarily disable it in the VeSync app, then retry.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the VeSync cloud.
error.no_air_fryer: Login succeeded but no supported air fryer was found on this account.

abort.already_configured: This VeSync account is already configured.

init.title: Polling intervals
init.description: How often to poll the VeSync cloud. Faster polling shows changes sooner but sends more requests.
